M-009.NAME: frontend-user
M-009.path: frontend frontend/public frontend/index.html frontend/vite.config.ts frontend/src/lib/session.ts scripts/session-security-smoke.mjs scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs docs/plans/Phase-67.xml scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs
M-009.owns: login, verified registration, password recovery, verify-email activation, dashboard, config delivery, subscription management, pending trial countdown/calendar UX, referrals and settings UI with per-device config awareness

phase-23-scope.primary-behaviors: mobile navigation, VPN status, config QR/download/copy, device create/rotate/revoke, subscription renewal/payment entry
phase-23-scope.unchanged-contracts: auth, VPN, device, billing, referral API shapes remain unchanged in Phase-23 unless a separate contract update is approved

phase-28-scope.primary-behaviors: pending check-email response, no token storage before verification, verify-email success/expired/replay states, resend path, compact mobile-safe registration

phase-31-scope.primary-behaviors: owner-only MTProto proxy API binding, compact dashboard proxy card, copy/open Telegram actions, and no-secret console traces

phase-44-scope.primary-files: App.tsx, Register.tsx, Login.tsx, ForgotPassword.tsx, ResetPassword.tsx, Settings.tsx, lib/api.ts, lib/passwordPolicy.ts, scripts/phase44-auth-email-ux-smoke.mjs
phase-44-scope.primary-behaviors: compact check-email state with spam hint, no stale trial/VPN registration promise, forgot/reset password screens, duplicate-email recovery CTA, and client-side password strength hints.
phase-44-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: frontend npm run build passed and Phase-44 auth/email UX smoke passed.

phase-45-scope.primary-behaviors: pending-first-VPN state, server-derived remaining days/hours/minutes, compact subscription calendar, and no stale 3-day trial copy.
phase-45-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: frontend npm run build passed and Phase-45 subscription UX smoke passed.

phase-46-scope.primary-behaviors: safe password format example, MTProto tg:// app link, https://t.me browser link, Russian proxy labels, and bounded 30s MTProto status refresh.
phase-46-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: frontend npm run build passed and Phase-46 user-cabinet UX smoke passed.

phase-51-scope.primary-files: index.html, vite.config.ts, public/favicon.ico, public/favicon-16x16.png, public/favicon-32x32.png, public/apple-touch-icon.png, public/pwa-192x192.png, public/pwa-512x512.png, public/brand/email-logo.png
phase-51-scope.primary-behaviors: Browser favicon/PWA asset delivery and public email-logo asset delivery without adding visible page logos before the planned frontend redesign.
phase-51-scope.evidence: 2026-06-02: frontend npm run build passed and Phase-51 smoke --expect-dist confirmed favicon/PWA/email-logo assets copied into dist.

phase-52-scope.primary-behaviors: Shared Matrix visual shell wraps the user route tree without changing auth, route structure, API clients, VPN, MTProto, billing, or deploy behavior.
phase-52-scope.evidence: 2026-06-03: frontend npm run build passed; Phase-52 smoke passed; Chrome screenshots for /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, and reduced-motion 390x844 passed visual review.

phase-53-scope.primary-files: Login.tsx, Register.tsx, ForgotPassword.tsx, ResetPassword.tsx, VerifyEmail.tsx, Layout.tsx, Loading.tsx, Dashboard.tsx, Config.tsx, Subscription.tsx, Referrals.tsx, Settings.tsx, index.css, scripts/phase53-user-matrix-ui-smoke.mjs
phase-53-scope.primary-behaviors: Compact Matrix user auth and cabinet routes, protected route smoke, MTProto redaction/link guards, trial/tariff invariants, readable forms, reduced-motion visual proof, and protected deploy/install isolation.
phase-53-scope.evidence: 2026-06-03: frontend npm run build passed; Phase-53 smoke passed; production-preview Chrome screenshots passed for login/register/reset mobile, login desktop, and reduced-motion login with virtual-time-budget.

phase-56-scope.primary-files: App.tsx, Landing.tsx, Login.tsx, Register.tsx, ForgotPassword.tsx, ResetPassword.tsx, VerifyEmail.tsx, Layout.tsx, index.css, scripts/phase56-premium-public-auth-smoke.mjs
phase-56-scope.primary-behaviors: Public / route, protected /dashboard cabinet route split with legacy redirects, visible logo auth lockups, verified-email safety copy, canonical tariff preview, and no backend/deploy/runtime behavior changes.
phase-56-scope.evidence: 2026-06-03: frontend npm run build passed; Phase-56 smoke passed; Phase-44/46/50/52/53/55 regressions passed; Chrome screenshot matrix for public/auth routes passed local review.

phase-59-scope.primary-files: components/MatrixBackground.tsx, components/VisualShell.tsx, pages/Dashboard.tsx, pages/Config.tsx, pages/Referrals.tsx, index.css, scripts/phase59-motion-interactions-smoke.mjs
phase-59-scope.primary-behaviors: Short route motion, copy/download/proxy feedback, status transitions, reduced-motion fallback, pointer-scroll safety, keyboard-focus safety, and inactive-tab lifecycle markers.
phase-59-scope.evidence: 2026-06-04: frontend npm run build, Phase-59 smoke, Phase-52/55/56/57 regressions, post-commit Phase-58 regression smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, git diff --check, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard passed.

phase-67-verification-design.primary-files: App.tsx, Landing.tsx, Login.tsx, Register.tsx, ForgotPassword.tsx, ResetPassword.tsx, components/BrandMark.tsx, components/MatrixBackground.tsx, components/VisualShell.tsx, index.css, scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs
phase-67-verification-design.primary-behaviors: Frontend-only route and auth presentation polish: splash-only / redirect to /login, frameless auth screens, requested Russian copy, red focus styling, browser-safe Matrix canvas fallback, and responsive auth viewport proof.
phase-67-verification-design.unchanged-contracts: Auth API calls, token storage boundaries, registration verification semantics, password recovery/reset semantics, dashboard/protected route behavior, backend, deploy/install, nginx, docker-compose, VPN, MTProto, and billing behavior remain unchanged.

phase-67-execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04: Phase-67 replaced / with a splash-only redirect to /login, retuned login/register/forgot/reset into frameless auth panels, preserved auth API calls/token boundaries/check-email/reset semantics, added scripts/phase67-auth-splash-smoke.mjs, passed frontend build, frontend-admin build, Phase-67 smoke, Phase-44/46/52/55/56/59/60/61/62/63 smokes, XML/MyGRACE/diff checks, and protected backend/deploy/admin/runtime guard.

session60-execution-evidence.local-2026-06-04: Follow-up session fix adds frontend/src/lib/session.ts, makes /login resume valid stored sessions across browser tabs, persists login/verify-email tokens through the session helper, and lets API/auth store enforce a 60-day idle TTL.
